blocks.text: Perfect! Let me create one final summary report:

input.code:
# Generate final QC summary
print("\n" + "=" * 100)
print("FINAL CITE-SEQ ANALYSIS REPORT")
print("=" * 100)

print(f"\n📊 DATASET OVERVIEW")
print(f"  • Total cells: {mdata['rna'].shape[0]}")
print(f"  • RNA features: {mdata['rna'].shape[1]} genes")
print(f"  • ADT features: {mdata['prot'].shape[1]} proteins")

print(f"\n🔍 QUALITY CONTROL")
print(f"  ✓ RNA QC applied (n_genes, n_counts, mt% filtering)")
print(f"  ✓ ADT QC applied (outlier detection on protein counts)")
print(f"  ✓ Cells retained: {mdata['rna'].shape[0]} / ~500 (initial synthetic)")

print(f"\n📈 PREPROCESSING")
print(f"  RNA:")
print(f"    - Normalization: log1p (library size + 1, then log)")
print(f"    - Highly variable genes: {len(np.where(rna.var['highly_variable'].values)[0])} selected")
print(f"    - Scaling: Z-score normalization")
print(f"  ADT:")
print(f"    - Normalization: CLR (Centered Log-Ratio) - gold standard for protein")
print(f"    - Scaling: Z-score normalization")

print(f"\n🔗 INTEGRATION & CLUSTERING")
print(f"  • Joint embedding: concatenated RNA HVGs + CLR-scaled ADT features")
print(f"  • Dimensionality reduction: PCA (50 components)")
print(f"  • Neighbors: k=15, n_pcs=30 (on joint PCA space)")
print(f"  • Clustering: Leiden algorithm, resolution=0.05")
print(f"  • Number of clusters: {len(np.unique(leiden_labels))}")
print(f"  • Cluster sizes: {np.bincount(leiden_labels).min()}-{np.bincount(leiden_labels).max()} cells")
print(f"  • Mean cluster size: {np.bincount(leiden_labels).mean():.1f} cells")

print(f"\n🧬 CELL TYPE ANNOTATION (from ADT markers)")
print(f"  Method: Heuristic-based classification on CD3E, CD14, CD19 expression")
print(f"  Results:")
for cell_type in sorted(rna.obs['cell_type'].unique()):
    count = (rna.obs['cell_type'] == cell_type).sum()
    pct = 100 * count / len(rna)
    print(f"    - {cell_type:12s}: {count:4d} cells ({pct:5.1f}%)")

print(f"\n✨ KEY OBSERVATIONS")

# T cell analysis
t_cells_mask = rna.obs['cell_type'] == 'T cell'
t_cd4 = X_adt_for_plot[t_cells_mask, protein_names.index('CD4')].mean()
t_cd8 = X_adt_for_plot[t_cells_mask, protein_names.index('CD8A')].mean()
print(f"  • T cells ({t_cells_mask.sum()} cells):")
print(f"    - Mean CD4 expression: {t_cd4:.3f}")
print(f"    - Mean CD8A expression: {t_cd8:.3f}")

# B cell analysis
b_cells_mask = rna.obs['cell_type'] == 'B cell'
b_cd19 = X_adt_for_plot[b_cells_mask, protein_names.index('CD19')].mean()
b_cd45 = X_adt_for_plot[b_cells_mask, protein_names.index('CD45')].mean()
print(f"  • B cells ({b_cells_mask.sum()} cells):")
print(f"    - Mean CD19 expression: {b_cd19:.3f} (B cell marker)")
print(f"    - Mean CD45 expression: {b_cd45:.3f}")

# Monocyte analysis
mono_mask = rna.obs['cell_type'] == 'Monocyte'
mono_cd14 = X_adt_for_plot[mono_mask, protein_names.index('CD14')].mean()
mono_hla = X_adt_for_plot[mono_mask, protein_names.index('HLA-DR')].mean()
print(f"  • Monocytes ({mono_mask.sum()} cells):")
print(f"    - Mean CD14 expression: {mono_cd14:.3f} (monocyte marker)")
print(f"    - Mean HLA-DR expression: {mono_hla:.3f}")

print(f"\n📁 OUTPUT FILES GENERATED")
outputs = [
    ('umap_leiden_clusters.png', 'Leiden clusters on UMAP embedding'),
    ('umap_adt_markers.png', 'Individual ADT markers on UMAP (15 subplots)'),
    ('umap_cell_types.png', 'Inferred cell types on UMAP'),
    ('cite_seq_summary.png', 'Comprehensive summary figure (9-panel)'),
    ('protein_expression_by_celltype.png', 'Heatmap: ADT expression × cell type'),
    ('cluster_assignments.csv', 'Cell barcode → cluster → cell type mapping'),
    ('cluster_adt_markers.csv', 'Cluster profiles with top ADT markers'),
    ('cell_type_marker_profiles.csv', 'Cell type-specific marker profiles'),
    ('cite_seq_analysis.h5mu', 'Full MuData object with all modalities & embeddings'),
]

for fname, description in outputs:
    print(f"  ✓ {fname:<40s} — {description}")

print(f"\n" + "=" * 100)
print("✅ Analysis complete! All outputs saved to WORK_DIR.")
print("=" * 100)
